meta.title: AllyOS Peptide Stack Family Master Selector — v1 (DRAFT)
meta.source: peptide_stack_family_master_v1 (physician-authored). Canonical top-level selector for the peptides line. Full source in protocols/peptide-stack-families/. Supersedes the v0.4 stack recommender and the loose stacks.list in peptide-iv-support.json.
meta.curated_by: Armando A. Falcon, MD (FL ME 84789) — RenuviaMD® PLLC, AllyOS Compliance Division
meta.architecture: client goal → ONE stack family → 2/3/4-peptide build → safety gate → IV/IM support match → standing order.

order: route to standing order only if cleared

build_size.4: advanced; stronger provider review + safety-gate pass

hard_rules: Select ONE primary family first. Do NOT assemble cross-family stacks unless the provider explicitly overrides and documents the rationale.
Builds are NOT automatic escalation — patient risk + provider judgment determine 2 vs 3 vs 4.

families.name: Metabolic / GLP / Body-Composition
families.build_4_pending: amylin (cagrilintide / pramlintide) needs a monograph — 4-build unavailable on the 30
families.evidence_language: Highest evidence sits with the GLP/GIP anchor pharmacology/weight-management trials; IV/IM is wellness support only.
do_not_claim: routine IV for all GLP clients
families.key_gate: GLP/GIP anchor: MTC/MEN2 boxed-warning + pancreatitis / gallbladder / diabetic-retinopathy screen; retatrutide HR/arrhythmia/HF review; MOTS-c additive-hypoglycemia if on insulin/sulfonylurea.

families.name: GH / Lean Mass / Recovery
families.evidence_language: GH/IGF-1 axis support; IV ingredients support recovery/nutrient wellness, not GH peptide potentiation.
families.key_gate: Active malignancy = hard stop (GH/IGF-1 axis); IGF-1 / glucose / edema / carpal-tunnel / retinopathy review; treat hypothyroidism first.

families.name: Mitochondrial / Energy / Longevity
families.build_4_pending: Humanin needs a monograph — 4-build unavailable on the 30
families.evidence_language: Axis-aligned mitochondrial energy support; human outcome evidence limited/mixed; no anti-aging guarantee.

families.name: Repair / Injury / Connective Tissue
families.dedupe_note: Dropped 'thymosin beta-4' (= TB-500, already the base). 4-build uses GHK-Cu (connective-tissue/repair overlap) from the 30.
iv_im_support: magnesium if cramps/recovery and renal screen clear
families.evidence_language: Recovery/repair wellness support; most peptide evidence remains preclinical/mechanistic.
families.key_gate: Active or prior malignancy = hard stop (BPC-157 / TB-500 / GHK-Cu are pro-angiogenic); GHK-Cu adds Wilson disease / copper-overload screen; rule out red-flag injury needing evaluation.

families.name: Skin / Hair / Glow / Aesthetic
families.modality_note: REBUILT injectable-only. The original aesthetic pool (palmitoyl pentapeptide-4 / acetyl hexapeptide-8 / tripeptide-1) are TOPICAL cosmeceuticals — removed from the injectable peptide line; they belong to a separate topical/aesthetic offering. Injectable skin/glow = GHK-Cu anchor + repair peptides (all in the 30).
families.evidence_language: Aesthetic wellness support; biotin allowed by wellness goal but nondeficient hair outcome evidence limited.
families.key_gate: Active or prior malignancy = hard stop (GHK-Cu / BPC-157 / TB-500 pro-angiogenic); GHK-Cu adds Wilson disease / copper-overload screen.

families.name: Sexual Vitality / HPG Axis
families.build_4_pending: oxytocin needs a monograph — 4-build unavailable on the 30
iv_im_support: magnesium if stress/tension and renal screen clear
families.evidence_language: Sexual wellness / HPG-axis support; IV nutrients are readiness/support only, not libido outcome proof.
families.key_gate: BP/HR with the PT-141/bremelanotide axis (uncontrolled HTN / CVD are label contraindications); oral-naltrexone review; PLUS hormone-sensitive malignancy (breast / prostate / endometrial / ovarian) + pituitary tumor screen for the kisspeptin/gonadorelin HPG-stimulation axis; pregnancy review.

families.name: Neuro / Focus / Calm / Sleep
families.evidence_language: Neuro-wellness support; DSIP sleep evidence is weak/limited (human endpoints sparse).
families.language_guardrail: Do NOT claim treatment of anxiety, insomnia, ADHD, depression, or cognitive disease. Gate on acute neuro symptoms / psychiatric instability / suicidality. 4-build adds Cerebrolysin — screen seizure disorder / status epilepticus + severe renal impairment (porcine-derived: allergy review); review concurrent sedatives/alcohol (Selank/DSIP additive sedation).

families.name: Immune / Inflammatory Wellness
families.build_3_4_pending: LL-37, thymulin, tuftsin need monographs — only thymosin alpha-1 + KPV are in the 30, so this family caps at a 2-build for now
families.evidence_language: Immune wellness support; not treatment of infection or immune disease.
families.key_gate: Active infection / fever / hypoxia / confusion / sepsis symptoms = DO NOT infuse; medical evaluation.

families.name: Non-GLP Fat-Loss / Metabolic Wellness
iv_im_support: Niagen/NR or NAD+ if energy/mitochondrial goal
families.evidence_language: High-market, low-to-moderate evidence wellness support; AOD-9604 FAILED a 24-wk 536-subject weight-loss trial (efficacy-limited).
families.key_gate: AOD efficacy-limitation language (failed a 24-wk 536-subject weight-loss trial); GH/IGF-1 glucose/edema/retinopathy review; MIC hepatic/gallbladder review.

iv_im_safety_delegation: Every iv_im_support group resolves to peptide-iv-support.json ingredient IDs, and every safety gate to the GLP gates / iv-module screens / wellness_iv_hard_stop rules — ONE safety source of truth. This selector adds the family/build/selector layer ON TOP; it does not restate doses or contraindications (no doses; routes to the locked standing order).

injectable_constraint_applied.rule: Every build uses ONLY the locked 30 injectable peptides. Topicals removed; non-library agents dropped from builds and parked behind 'needs monograph'. Thymosin beta-4 deduped to TB-500.

supersedes: peptide-stack-families.json (prior draft), the v0.4 stack_axis recommender, and stacks.list + stack_recommender_example in peptide-iv-support.json. Migrate workspace.html stack monographs to these 9 families.
validation_cases_ref: protocols/peptide-stack-families/validation_cases_v1.csv (10 cases, incl. V1_010: 4-peptide energy build + chest pain → HARD STOP, do not route to IV/NAD until urgent eval).
sources_ref: protocols/peptide-stack-families/source_audit_v1.csv (22 sources — DailyMed labels, NEJM retatrutide, PubMed mechanistic, NIH ODS, FDA biotin, MSD Myers — each with does_not_support).

signoff_ledger.status: DRAFT — canonical v1 selector, constrained to the 30 injectables; 3-auditor lock complete (all PASS / PASS-WITH-NOTES, notes applied). Audit-clean; pending only the gate package + workspace migration + MD sign-off.

auditors.clinical: PASS-WITH-NOTES (2026-06-29) — architecture/anchor-rule/claim-discipline/constraint-honesty sound, zero fabrication. Notes APPLIED: added family-level key_gates surfacing absolute contraindications — FAM01 (MTC/MEN2 + retatrutide CV + MOTS-c hypoglycemia), FAM02 (GH-axis malignancy + IGF-1/glucose), FAM04 & FAM05 (pro-angiogenic active/prior malignancy + GHK-Cu Wilson/copper), FAM06 (hormone-sensitive malignancy + pituitary, kisspeptin/gonadorelin), FAM07 (Cerebrolysin seizure/renal + sedation).
auditors.citation_regulatory: PASS-WITH-NOTES (2026-06-29) — no efficacy overclaim, sources consistent with does_not_support, regulatory posture correct, constraint honestly documented. Notes APPLIED: FAM09 evidence_language now carries the AOD failed-trial efficacy-limitation; FAM07 now surfaces DSIP weak/limited sleep evidence.
auditors.schema: PASS (2026-06-29) — strict-valid JSON, 9 unique families, every build peptide resolves to the locked 30, buildability buckets consistent (FAM04 corrected to full 2/3/4).

pending: (OPTIONAL, to expand deeper builds) Author monographs for the parked injectable agents — cagrilintide, pramlintide, Humanin, oxytocin, LL-37, thymulin, tuftsin — to unlock the 4-builds (and FAM08's 3/4).
Confirm each family's IV/IM groups resolve to peptide-iv-support ingredient IDs + provide the wellness_iv_hard_stop gate package (referenced, not yet in-repo).
Migrate workspace.html stack monographs to the 9 families.
3-auditor lock + Medical Director sign-off → set effective + flip to locked.
